skills.title: MY SKILLS
skills.subtitle: Currents that never stop — scroll and dive into each one

milestones.title: MY PATH
milestones.subtitle: EVERY MILESTONE, A TIDE
milestones.text: From military leadership to code — every choice was a current that brought me here.

military.title: Where It All Began
military.description: As an Officer in the Brazilian Army, I led a team responsible for acquisitions and contracts. Here I learned that discipline, strategy, and accountability are non-negotiable.

law_school.title: The Detour That Led Me Here
law_school.description: Completed my Law degree and, in that moment of reflection, it became clear that the legal world wasn't my place. I researched, discovered technology, and fell in love with it. There was no turning back.

transition.title: Diving Into the Unknown
transition.description: I closed the military chapter and dove headfirst into uncharted waters. With full focus and a lot of curiosity, I dedicated myself entirely to building a new foundation in tech.

software_college.title: The Right Degree
software_college.description: I started Software Engineering — this time, with no doubts. Every subject confirmed what I already felt: technology wasn't just a choice, it was an identity.

freelancer.title: First Waves
freelancer.description: I took my first steps as an independent developer, building digital presence for small businesses. Every delivered site was proof I was growing.

siberia.title: First Current
siberia.description: At Siberia Digital, my first professional experience in tech and it ran deep. Beyond development, I dove into Digital Marketing, working across the full infrastructure of offers, funnels, and automations.

voluntary.title: Building With Purpose
voluntary.description: At Código Certo Coders, I led a volunteer development team. I learned that collaborative code carries a different weight — it holds the energy of those who believe in what they're building.

machlev.title: Refining the Surface
machlev.description: At Machlev, I focused on what users see and feel. I worked on evolving the platform's interface with a focus on usability, responsiveness, and visual consistency.

freelancer_two.title: Open Waters
freelancer_two.description: Back to freelancing, I expanded into more complex solutions — quizzes, FastAPI microservices, n8n automations, and multi-platform integrations. Every project, a new challenge to navigate.
